sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13940" key="a)posfh/nwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσφήν-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impaction</tr_> of an infant in childbirth, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
